name: 3-Year Debt Status Redetermination

eligibility.description: Corporations with existing acquisition debt that have improved their financial ratios (debt-to-equity < 2:1 or improved earnings) over a 3-year period.

description: If an obligation was previously classified as corporate acquisition indebtedness, it can lose that restrictive status if the corporation meets the debt-to-equity and earnings tests for three consecutive years.
